forgot_password.title: Forgot Password?
forgot_password.subtitle: Don't worry! Enter your email address and we'll send you a code to reset your password.

reset_password.title: Reset Password
reset_password.subtitle: Create a new strong password for your account

verify_email.title: Verify Your Email
verify_email.subtitle: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to

select_profile.title: Select Profile
select_profile.subtitle: Switch between family members to track their progress

screen1.title: Your health, all in one place
screen1.description: Store your medical records, medicine reminders, and family profiles easily in Cureta.

screen2.title: Keep your medical history safe
screen2.description: Save your diseases, notes, prescriptions, tests, and scans in one place.

screen3.title: Never Miss Your Medicine
screen3.description: Get simple reminder at the right time

screen4.title: Instant Medication Setup
screen4.description: Scan your prescription to automatically set up medicine alerts and track your treatment.

screen5.title: Share your health info safely
screen5.description: Create a QR code and choose what medical data to share.

screen6.title: Care for your family
screen6.description: Add profiles for your family members and switch between them easily.

screen7.title: Your personal health assistant
screen7.description: Ask questions and get instant, reliable health advice personalized just for you.

add_record.condition_question: What is the disease or condition?
add_record.condition_example: e.g. Diabetes, Allergy, High blood pressure
add_record.first_symptoms_question: When did you first notice symptoms?
add_record.related_files_description: Select a category below to upload a photo or PDF. This helps doctors understand your history better.
add_record.additional_notes_title: Anything else you want to add?
add_record.additional_notes_description: Feel free to share any details we missed.
add_record.review_description: Please review your details before saving.

name.title: What is the full name?
name.subtitle: We'll use this to personalize the health dashboard.

gender.title: What is the gender?
gender.subtitle: This helps us provide relevant health insights.

relation.title: How are they related to you?
relation.subtitle: Select your relationship to this person.

age.title: What is the age?
age.subtitle: This helps us tailor the plan to the specific life stage.

medical_conditions_chronic.subtitle: Select all that apply. This helps personalize health insights.

medical_conditions.title: Are there any chronic diseases or allergies?

blood_type.title: What is the blood type?
blood_type.subtitle: This helps us provide more personalized health insights and emergency support.
blood_type.footer_note: Don't worry! You can update this later in the profile

validation.password_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.password_max_length: Password must be less than 50 characters
validation.name_min_length: Full name must be at least 2 characters
validation.phone_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number

chat.greeting_message: Hello! I can help you understand your medical records or check for drug interactions. What would you like to do today?
chat.user_question: Can you explain my recent blood test results?
chat.reply_message: Of course. I can see your fasting glucose was 105 mg/dL. This is slightly above the typical range (70-99 mg/dL). Would you like me to explain what might cause this or suggest some follow-up questions for your doctor?
